response: On March 15, 2024, at 14:23 UTC, a powerful magnitude 7.2 earthquake struck near Tokyo, Japan, at coordinates 35.6N 139.7E, with a shallow depth of 15 kilometers. The quake triggered a tsunami warning and impacted approximately 2.3 million people, resulting in 12 confirmed casualties and an estimated $4.5 billion in damages. Authorities are assessing the full extent of the destruction as rescue and recovery efforts continue.
